title: Ace Searches for Luffy
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on ace searches for luffy, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Ace Searches for Luffy. Kureha fires Hiriluk’s final miracle into the snow, sending Chopper off beneath cherry blossoms and a new flag. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: She knew all along about what you wanted to do, it seems.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: She's a wonderful person, isn't she...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahem. I'd like to welcome our new friend,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, chef! Bring some snacks to go along with the drinks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What did you say to me!? I'm not your servant, Pal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sanji! Do we have any more dino meat!? We packed a whole bunch, didn't we!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And so, I'd like to propose a toast on this occasion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now sails at the fastest speed towards the kingdom of sand, alabasta...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Going back just a little in time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: On the island of giants, little garden.

summary: This part highlights ace searches for luffy and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
